name: Dinero Express #2
description_short: Check-cashing service at S I-35 Frontage Rd in Austin, TX offering check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and title loans with extended hours (7AM–10PM).
description_long:
Dinero Express #2 is a check-cashing and short-term lending storefront located in south Austin on I-35 Frontage Road. The business operates with extended daily hours (7AM–10PM Friday) and accepts walk-in customers seeking immediate cash access. According to its listing on iPaydayLoans, the location functions as a check-cashing service with affiliated lending products rather than a direct lender.

The company advertises four main financial products: check cashing, payday loans, installment loans, and title loans. Customers can apply online through the iPaydayLoans portal or call the location directly at 512-904-0078. The website includes loan calculators that show example APRs as high as 311% for payday products and installment/title loan options at varying annual interest rates. The company claims to work with customers who have bad credit and positions itself as an alternative to traditional banking.

Dinero Express #2 distinguishes itself primarily through extended operating hours (7AM–10PM) compared to many competitors and a physical storefront location in a high-traffic area. The business is listed alongside national chains like Ace Cash Express, Advance America, and MoneyMart, suggesting it operates within a franchise or affiliate network. However, the company's online presence is limited to the iPaydayLoans directory listing with minimal independent branding.

Customer reviews on file are notably negative, with both available reviews rating the location 1 star and citing poor staff attitude and service quality. One reviewer specifically mentioned the check-cashing employee being in "a bad mood" and wasting customers' time, while another criticized staff mood and service errors during transactions. The location's overall rating on the platform is 2.3 stars, indicating consistent service complaints. For consumers seeking basic check-cashing services or short-term loans, the extended hours may be attractive, but the service reputation and high APRs warrant careful consideration.
address: 5717 S I-35 Frontage Rd C-180, Austin, TX 78744

company_info.headquarters: 5717 S I-35 Frontage Rd C-180, Austin, TX 78744

pros: Extended operating hours (7AM–10PM Friday) provide accessibility for working adults
Physical storefront location in high-traffic I-35 corridor for immediate in-person service
Multiple loan products available (payday, installment, title) from one location
Online application option via iPaydayLoans portal for remote customers
Claims to serve customers with bad credit and offers payday advance loans
Same-location check-cashing and lending reduces need for multiple visits
cons: Consistently poor customer reviews (2.3-star average, 1-star ratings citing staff attitude and service errors)
Extremely high APRs (311% shown in payday loan calculator example)
Limited independent online presence or company-controlled information; reliant on third-party directory listing
Customer complaints specifically mention staff rudeness and time-wasting during transactions
No transparent fee schedule or rate disclosures visible on listing
best_for: Customers needing immediate check-cashing services during extended hours in south Austin
Workers seeking emergency small loans outside standard banking hours
Individuals in the I-35 corridor area looking for walk-in lending accessibility
diagnosis: Dinero Express #2 is primarily a check-cashing service with attached short-term lending products, suitable only for customers needing immediate cash access in the south Austin area who have exhausted traditional banking options. The main caveat is the significantly negative customer service reviews combined with extremely high APRs (311% payday example), making this best treated as a last-resort emergency resource rather than a primary financial service.
